title: Draft README Guide Content
description: Create clear, concise, and comprehensive guide content for the README file, covering setup, usage, and contribution instructions.
details:
Write a guide section for the README.md that includes:
- Project overview and purpose
- Quick start instructions (install, run, build)
- Explanation of core features (ChatInput, ChatArea, API integration)
- Usage instructions for end users
- Contribution guidelines (if applicable)
- Links to further documentation or resources
Ensure the guide is beginner-friendly, accurate, and up to date with the current codebase.
test_strategy: Review the drafted guide for completeness, clarity, and accuracy. Ask a peer to read and follow the instructions to ensure they work as described.

title: Integrate Guide into README.md
description: Add the drafted guide content into the project's README.md file, ensuring proper formatting and structure.
details: Insert the drafted guide into the README.md, using Markdown best practices for headings, lists, and code blocks. Place the guide in a logical location (e.g., after the project title and badges, before advanced sections). Ensure the README remains readable and well-organized.
test_strategy: Preview the README.md in a Markdown viewer to confirm correct formatting and structure. Check for broken links or formatting errors.

title: Review and Refine README Guide
description: Proofread and refine the integrated guide for clarity, accuracy, and consistency with project standards.
details: Carefully review the updated README.md for typos, unclear instructions, or outdated information. Ensure terminology matches the codebase and PRD. Make any necessary edits for clarity and professionalism.
test_strategy: Perform a final read-through and optionally request feedback from another team member. Confirm that all instructions are actionable and correct.
